cards.prompt: A Mutex has thread affinity: ReleaseMutex from a thread that does not own it throws ApplicationException, while the owner releases fine
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; var mtx = new Mutex(); mtx.WaitOne(); bool nonOwnerThrew = false; var t = new Thread(() => { try { mtx.ReleaseMutex(); } catch (ApplicationException) { nonOwnerThrew = true; } }); t.Start(); t.Join(); mtx.ReleaseMutex(); Console.WriteLine($"nonOwnerThrew={nonOwnerThrew}");

cards.prompt: A SemaphoreSlim(0,3) starts at count 0; Release returns the previous count (0) and increments CurrentCount to 1
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; var s = new SemaphoreSlim(0, 3); s.Wait(0); int c1 = s.CurrentCount; int prev = s.Release(); int c2 = s.CurrentCount; Console.WriteLine($"c1={c1} prev={prev} c2={c2}");

cards.prompt: A ManualResetEventSlim acts like a gate: one Set releases ALL four waiting threads and stays signaled (IsSet True) until Reset
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; var mre = new ManualResetEventSlim(false); int passed = 0; var done = new CountdownEvent(4); for(int i=0;i<4;i++){ var t = new Thread(()=>{ mre.Wait(); Interlocked.Increment(ref passed); done.Signal(); }); t.Start(); } Thread.Sleep(50); mre.Set(); done.Wait(); Console.WriteLine($"passed={passed} signaled={mre.IsSet}");
